issue: exported component with no permission protection

details.reason: Exported provider 'com.bgnmobi.core.provider.CPProvider' declares no read/write permission — any app can access it.

Provider 'com.ironsource.lifecycle.IronsourceLifecycleProvider' has an intent-filter but no explicit android:exported attribute. On API < 31 this defaults to exported=true. No permission guard found — potentially accessible by any app.

issue: deep-link activity with custom URI scheme and no permission

details.reason: Activity 'com.facebook.CustomTabActivity' registers the custom URI scheme 'fbconnect://' without a permission guard. Any app can trigger this activity by crafting an Intent with a matching URI.
